name: Liver Piquant
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip slices of liver in salted flour and pan-fry in butter for 6 to 7 minutes or until browned. Do not overcook. Remove to hot plate.
2. Stir 1 tablespoon flour into the pan, add water, and stir until thickened.
3. Add lemon juice, olives, mushrooms, and Worcestershire sauce and blend well.
4. When thoroughly heated, serve as a gravy with the liver. Serve with rice or potatoes.
